institution_overview.name: Godavari Institute of Engineering and Technology
institution_overview.location: NH-16, Chaitanya Knowledge City, Rajahmundry, Andhra Pradesh 533296
institution_overview.about_text: Godavari Institute of Engineering & Technology (GIET) was established in 1998 to offer engineering education of world-class standards. Over the years, the college has come a long way to gain a place of repute and a preferred destination for quality engineering education.

admission_and_fees.btech_fee_structure: Fees range from INR 85,000 to INR 1,10,000 per year depending on the branch.
admission_and_fees.mtech_fee_structure: INR 60,000 per year for all M.Tech specializations.
admission_and_fees.hostel_fee_structure: INR 70,000 to 90,000 per year depending on AC/Non-AC and sharing basis.
admission_and_fees.admission_process: Admissions to B.Tech are made through AP EAPCET. Category B seats are filled by management quota.

undergraduate_btech.description: Focuses on software, hardware, and algorithms.
labs: Computer Science and Engineering Basic Lab

undergraduate_btech.description: Deals with electronic devices, circuits, and communication equipment.
Study of electrical power, machines, and electronics.
Design, analysis, and manufacturing of machinery.
Construction, design, and maintenance of physical environment.
Applies computing technology for managing business data.
Specializes in artificial intelligence and ML models.
labs: CSE - AI & Machine Learning Basic Lab

undergraduate_btech.description: Focuses on big data analytics and data mining.

placements_history.summary: GIET Rajahmundry has an outstanding placement record with over 80% students placed annually in reputed MNCs and Core companies.
training_programs: Campus Recruitment Training (CRT) starting from 2nd Year.
Company Specific Training (TCS Ninja, Wipro Elite, etc.)

year_wise_data.highlights_statement: In the year 2021, the campus saw 1221 offers, with the highest package reaching 36 LPA offered by a top MNC.
In the year 2022, the campus saw 1222 offers, with the highest package reaching 37 LPA offered by a top MNC.
In the year 2023, the campus saw 1223 offers, with the highest package reaching 38 LPA offered by a top MNC.
In the year 2024, the campus saw 1224 offers, with the highest package reaching 39 LPA offered by a top MNC.

library.name: Central Library
library.digital_library: Access to IEEE, Springer, DELNET, NPTEL videos.

transportation.details: A massive fleet of 60 buses ensures safe transit for day scholars and staff covering a radius of 50 KMs.

infrastructure_and_facilities.medical_facility: In-house dispensary with a visiting doctor, 24/7 ambulance service.

sports_and_athletics.overview: Physical education is an integral part. The campus has sprawling grounds for outdoor sports and well-equipped indoor facilities.
indoor_facilities: Well-equipped Gymnasium for boys and girls
past_achievements: Gold Medalist in State level Powerlifting

cultural_fest.name: Fest-De-GIET
cultural_fest.description: The annual national level cultural fest featuring celebrity concerts, dance competitions, fashion shows, and musical nights. It is the biggest fest in the region.

technical_fest.name: Tech-Srijan
technical_fest.description: A national level technical symposium. Involves paper presentations, robot battles, coding hackathons, and project expos.

student_clubs_and_societies.name: NSS Unit
student_clubs_and_societies.focus: Social service, blood donation camps, village adoption.

student_demographics.student_origin: Primarily from Andhra Pradesh, Telangana, with a significant number of students from northeastern states and other parts of India.

achievements: Awarded 'Best Engineering College in A.P.' by various educational surveys.
Recognized by MSME as a Business Incubator.
MOU with leading industries for student internships.
Hundreds of students participating in National Smart India Hackathon (SIH) every year.
Received grants from AICTE, DST for research projects.
